strategy_summary: The binary is a 32-bit ELF with partial RELRO, no canary, and NX enabled. The main function reads input into a buffer and prints it, which suggests a format string vulnerability. We will use the format string to leak an address from the GOT, then overwrite the printf GOT entry with the address of system. Finally, we will send a payload that triggers a call to printf, which will now point to system, and pass "/bin/sh" as an argument to get a shell.
